units.content: Gunasekaran et al. examine the power and pitfalls of AlphaFold2 for structure prediction beyond rigid globular proteins, in Nature Chemical Biology 20:950-959, 2024
The same mitigation as Karelina (v6.2.10) applies to this reference
Claim 8a is a pre-registered architectural predictor derived from attribute-set arithmetic
Claim 8a is not a post-hoc observational evaluation, distinguishing it from Gunasekaran et al.
The pre-registered architectural nature of claim 8a mitigates the FTO risk posed by Gunasekaran et al.
